name: Western Union
description_short: 1301 Long Beach Blvd's Western Union in Long Beach, CA provides money transfers and check cashing.
description_long:
Western Union operates a standalone check-cashing branch at 1301 Long Beach Boulevard in Long Beach, CA. The location is open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 8 PM, and weekends from 9 AM to 7 PM, making it accessible for busy schedules. For Long Beach residents, this address provides convenient walk-in access to financial services.

This location specializes in wire transfers, international money transfers, check cashing, and bill payment services for Long Beach, CA residents. The experienced staff can help with domestic and international transactions. Call +1 562-599-1550 to confirm current services, exchange rates, and any identification requirements for your transaction.

When visiting this Long Beach branch, bring your government-issued ID and any checks you need to cash. Whether you're sending money overseas, cashing a paycheck, or paying a bill, this Long Beach location offers quick, reliable service. Plan to allow 10-15 minutes for most transactions.
address: 1301 Long Beach Blvd, Long Beach, CA 90813

company_info.headquarters: 1301 Long Beach Blvd, Long Beach, CA 90813

pros: Massive agent network with 150+ locations shown in single state search, including major retailers (Walmart, Safeway, City Market, Kroger)
Hybrid 24/7 online initiation combined with same-day in-store payment and pickup options
Multi-language support in 6 languages (English, Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, Vietnamese)
Track transfer feature provides real-time monitoring of money sent
Western Union Rewards program offers incentives for repeat customers
Accepts multiple payment methods and offers prepaid card options
Additional services including bill payment, mobile top-ups, and money orders reduce need for multiple providers
cons: Transfer fees are higher than digital-only money transfer competitors like Wise or PayPal
Recipient pickup limited to agent location hours, which may not be 24/7 despite online availability
Website experienced service disruptions (Orange Wallet temporarily unavailable during research)
Some locations limited to money order services only (e.g., Circle K #0682 in Leadville)
Geolocation required for accurate location discovery, creating friction for users
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers who prefer cash transactions and don't have access to digital banking
International remittance senders who need established, trusted services with broad global coverage
Consumers prioritizing same-day cash availability over lowest transfer fees
Immigrant communities sending money to family abroad and needing multi-language support
diagnosis: Western Union is best for consumers who value physical accessibility and speed over competitive pricing—those without bank accounts, immigrants sending remittances, and anyone needing same-day cash access. The main caveat is that their fees significantly exceed digital alternatives like Wise or Remitly, making them more expensive for price-sensitive customers with internet access and bank accounts.
services: International and domestic money transfers with online initiation
meta_description: Western Union at 1301 Long Beach Blvd, Long Beach, CA. Check cashing, money transfers & bill payments.
